name: Tira-mi-su
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine mascarpone cheese, heavy cream, powdered sugar, vanilla, coffee liqueur, and instant coffee. Whip until stiff.
2. Split the sponge cake into thirds.
3. Spread half of the cream mixture on the bottom layer.
4. Place the middle layer on it and spread with the remaining cream.
5. Replace the top layer.
6. Refrigerate for 1 hour.
7. Just before serving, dust the top of the cake with cocoa powder.
